channel.title: xodn348 public projects
channel.description: Auto-updated public project feed for xodn348

item.title: codesure
item.description: ⚠️ Moved to xodn348/codekit — Privacy-first security scanner (monorepo)

item.title: ray.project-reproducibility
item.description: Clean reproducibility package for Bitcoin transaction data paper

item.title: ccLatex
item.description: Render LaTeX math in terminal streams and PTY-wrapped AI CLI output

item.title: deeper
item.description: Depth-first interview agent driven by Huntley's ralph + feedback loops. Drills one claim to bedrock (first principle / source of truth); never expands. Per-round fresh subagent dispatch + path-bias self-improvement.

item.title: future-history
item.description: A Future History of Humanity: a data-anchored 2026→2200 forecast across three branches, with generated era art.

item.title: clawpay
item.description: Open-source payment MCP server for AI agents — Lithic & Stripe & PayPal

item.title: destiny
item.description: Daily fortune-telling plugin for Claude Code.

item.title: llm-wiki
item.description: LLM-maintained wiki of paradigm-shifting (Fleming-tier) scientific papers — chunk-level graph + topic atlas, Karpathy LLM Wiki pattern conformant

item.title: pegasus
item.description: Cloud-native autonomous project leader on Claude Code. Phone start → laptop off → autonomous completion.

item.title: cleanup
item.description: Passive tool-usage tracking + proactive removal recommendations for Claude Code. Never auto-deletes.

item.title: BTC_EXP
item.description: Bitcoin network explorer and analysis tools

item.title: han
item.description: A compiled programming language with Korean keywords, written in Rust

item.title: cc-img-proxy
item.description: PTY proxy that renders inline images in Claude Code via iTerm2 OSC 1337

item.title: Fleming-AI
item.description: AI-powered research assistant for scientific literature

item.title: codekit
item.description: AI-native code quality and security toolkit for AI-assisted development

item.title: codesure-rules
item.description: Community-maintained security rules for CodeSure MCP scanner. Malicious code pattern database.

item.title: readhn
item.description: AI-native HackerNews MCP Server with EigenTrust expert ranking and explainable quality signals

item.title: tokencrush
item.description: LLM API cost optimizer — cache responses, compress prompts, cut costs
